name: e621-open-api
description: This repository is the home of OpenAPI documentation for https://e621.net. It is maintained by [Donovan_DMC](https://e621.net/users/323290). ## You can find the rendered version [here](https://e621.wiki).

scripts.build: npm run build:openapi && npm run build:openapi:dereferenced && NODE_ENV=$NODE_ENV npm run build:webpack
scripts.build:openapi: npm exec swagger-cli -- bundle ./api/api.yaml --outfile ./openapi.yaml --type yaml && node ./scripts/inject-e621ng-commit.mjs ./openapi.yaml
scripts.build:openapi:dereferenced: npm exec swagger-cli -- bundle ./api/api.yaml --outfile ./openapi.dereferenced.yaml --type yaml -r && node ./scripts/inject-e621ng-commit.mjs ./openapi.dereferenced.yaml

author: Donovan_DMC <hewwo@yiff.rocks>
